publishedAbstract: * It is required to expire all objects in a Loki bucket, which are stored in an ODF Multicloud Object Gateway (Noobaa) instance, after 7 days using Noobaa's s3 interface. Note that updating the Loki's retention policy will also reduce storage consumption.
publishedTitle: How to expire all objects in a Loki bucket after 7 days using ODF Multicloud Object Gateway (Noobaa) s3 interface
